content.en:
"You two, your demands are too much, please leave!"

Ye Tian said coldly, expelling them directly.

The two Fifth Realms of the Great Thousand Feather Gate and the Jiaye Buddha Gate naturally guessed that Ye Tian would refuse, and there was no surprise at all.

However, even if Ye Tian refused, they would not give up.

The multidimensional catastrophe of death is coming, and they must seize any opportunity that may exist.

And the Thirteen Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Supreme Treasure Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower is too precious, and the defense is extremely strong, if they obtain it, they can use this treasure to avoid the Death Multi-Dimensional Tribulation, and the success rate is very large.

Therefore, no matter what, they must also take this innate multi-dimensional treasure.

"Guys, come out!"

The fifth realm of the Great Thousand Feather Gate opened.

The next moment.

One after another the Fifth Realm came out, and a total of nine Fifth Realms came out.

The number of the Fifth Realm is very rare, hundreds of multi-dimensional tribulations come, and an average multi-dimensional tribulation can give birth to a Fifth Realm, so that only hundreds of Fifth Realms can be born, and some multi-dimensional tribulations will also fall into the Fifth Realm.

As a result, there are now more than 100 Fifth Realms on the 4,000th Territory, and there are more than 70 Fifth Realms on the cultivator's side.

Now, there are nine Fifth Realms to besiege Ye Tian at one time, how important this is!

Swish!

Ye Tian fled, and the nine Fifth Realm 550 immediately chased after him.

Rumble!!!

A Fifth Realm holding a Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure directly intercepted Ye Tian in the seventh dimension, and directly blocked the dimensional void.

"Do you really want to do that?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Hand over the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower!"

The Nine Fifth Realms spoke out again.

"Then let's fight!"

Although Ye Tian wanted to keep a low profile, it seemed that these nine Fifth Realms would not give up, so they could only fight.

Thundered!!!!!

Nine Fifth Realms have made moves, and several of them are extremely powerful in the Fifth Realm, and they have already comprehended the rules of the double dimension, and there is even one who has comprehended the rules of the triple dimension, and three of them have comprehended the Tenth Dimension Will Peerless, and two have comprehended the Five Realms Multidimensional Peerless.

If it were another fifth realm, it would almost be certain death.

But Ye Tian was no longer the time when he had just broken through to the fifth realm, if he was still in the fifth realm or still had the strength when he fought with the Red Demon Realm Lord, he would still have to be defeated this time.

He could have escaped, but the Terrans couldn't.

But now, he is not afraid of these nine Fifth Realms.

Rumble!!!!

The fivefold dimensional rules were revealed, directly crushing the void of these fifth realm dimensional rules.

"Multi-dimensional sword blade, slash!"

The multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms erupted, and the brilliant sword light tore through everything, plus the ten-dimensional sword of the tenth dimension will mastery collided with their will mastery.

Moreover, Ye Tian's physical strength was too terrifying, fusing five innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, even if their cultivation was higher than Ye Tian's, their physical strength was not as good as Ye Tian's.

Boom!

The combined blows of the nine Fifth Realms were all crushed by Ye Tian.

Burst!

The multi-dimensional sword blade directly broke through the body of one of the weaker Fifth Realms, directly destroying his physical body and soul will.

As soon as they fought, one Fifth Realm fell, and the remaining eight Fifth Realms trembled one by one.

It's horrible!

This is still a new fifth realm that has only just been promoted to the fifth realm?

Could it be that the treasures left behind by the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord are so amazing, and a Fifth Realm can be raised to this level in a short period of time, but even if it is a Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, he has only comprehended the rules of the Sixfold Dimension!

And one of the Fifth Realms stared at the Firmament Wooden Blade in Ye Tian's hand.

"Damn, you snatched my Celestial Blade!"

He cultivated the Firmament Wood Blade in the Celestial Spider Battlefield, but was destroyed by a certain Fourth Realm and took the Firmament Wood Blade, and he couldn't find who did it.

Now, he finally knows that it was Ye Tian who did it in the first place.

Ye Tian took out the Firmament Wooden Blade, naturally he was not afraid of the Luo Qing Realm Lord, the strength of the Luo (CFEF) Qing Realm Lord was not as good as him now, would he be afraid of the Luo Qing Realm Lord?

Thundered!!!

The two sides continued to kill, and soon another fifth realm was severely injured by Ye Tian, and he had no choice but to withdraw from the battlefield.

But they haven't given up yet, and they are still attacking Ye Tian.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian's other replica body arrived, and the terrifying aura made these Fifth Realms tremble.

"And a doppelganger!"

This time, Ye Tian's replica body was directly killed with a Six Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Supreme Treasure Spear, which was obtained from the property of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian's two major copy bodies attacked together, easily defeating these Fifth Realms.

"If you don't leave, I'll kill you!"

Ye Tian threatened.

Although he really wanted to kill this group of Fifth Realms, once he really did so, the Fifth Realms of the forces behind them would definitely join forces with other Fifth Realms to encircle and suppress him.

He didn't want to face all the Fifth Realms yet, and his current strength was definitely not invincible, so there was no need to make enemies like this.

As for the Fifth Realm who was killed before, he has no background in himself, and if he kills, he will be killed, so he will be regarded as a deterrent!

These Fifth Realms were so frightened that they fled immediately, where did they dare to stay!

It didn't take long for them to return to their respective forces, and they never mentioned the matter of besieging Ye Tian again.

However, the news of the fall of a fifth realm could not be concealed at all.

Not long after, the news of the Fifth Realm's killing spread, and Ye Tian's reputation also spread.

However, Ye Tian is still very low-key and is still practicing silently.

He knew very well that this strength was still not enough.

His current goal is to comprehend the rules of the Six Dimensions, and then create a Supreme Sect of the Five Realms by himself.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's six innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies had all broken through to the fourth layer of the Dacheng realm, and some had even reached the limit of Dacheng, which made his physical fitness improve a bit.

And the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, there is also hope at present, he has tried again and again, and has created some fur by himself, but it still does not meet the standard of the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

In this way, another 20 million extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect finally succeeded in creating his own.

Tenth dimension.

Ye Tian entered here and experimented with the newly created Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

Airplanes!

The dimensional rules and the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation turned into a wisp of sword wire, and as a sword slashed out, this wisp of sword wire instantly tore through the tenth dimension, and even cut into the eleventh dimension.

"This move is called the ten-dimensional sword silk!"

Ye Tian said.
